title: Aurora, 26214, MiYoni Koala, 9In, Soft Toy, Grey
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: From Aurora's highly popular MiYoni Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Expertly designed with life like features
Children will love this beautiful real life animal
description: Product Description Aurora World's Miyoni premium plush animals are made with superior materials and great attention to detail Every item is beautifully designed and features realistic air-brushed colour accents to replicate the animals as found in nature Each animal features a special hang tag with unique species information This is a stunning Koala featuring a multi-tonal grey plush material with black and white fluffy accents Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products Box Contains Item
